backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing game logic for a Clash of Clans-style game with player state management, building placement, troop training, matchmaking, and attack recording using Motoko Map and List data structures.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented visual enhancements including 3D building models, lighting/shadows, terrain rendering, and visual effects with associated files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components describing 3D rendering, game mechanics, UI elements, and custom hooks for the game application.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes defining colors for UI components, borders, backgrounds, and chart elements.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Clash Builder application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that initializes the player via backend actor on mount and renders GameLayout with toast notifications.
Attack mode view component with 3D Canvas rendering enemy base buildings, deployed troops, battle UI, and results display with enhanced lighting setup.
frontend/src/components/game/BuildingPla: Renders a ghost preview mesh for building placement that follows the mouse pointer, snaps to grid, and changes color based on placement validity.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/B: Routes building data to appropriate 3D building components based on type, handles construction progress animation, and displays construction indicators.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/D: Renders 3D models for defensive buildings (cannon and archer tower) with stone towers, battlements, and weapon-specific details that scale with level and construction progress.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/R: Renders 3D models for resource buildings (gold mine, elixir collector, barracks) with animated particle effects for mines and collectors, scaling with level and construction progress.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/S: Renders 3D storage building models with reinforced containers, corner bracing, locks, and type-specific glow effects (gold or elixir) that scale with level.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/T: React Three Fiber component that renders a 3D Town Hall building with stone walls, corner towers, decorative bands, entrance archway, roof with gold trim, and flag pole. Scales based on level and construction progress.
frontend/src/components/game/buildings/W: React Three Fiber component that renders a 3D defensive wall with stone foundation, mortar lines, crenellations on top, and a cap. Height scales with level and construction progress.
frontend/src/components/game/BuildMenu.t: Collapsible build menu UI component displaying available buildings with icons, costs, and placement buttons in a grid layout with scroll area.
frontend/src/components/game/Constructio: Displays a 3D HTML overlay showing remaining construction time with an icon, updating every second until construction completes.
Main Three.js canvas component that sets up camera, lighting, orbit controls, and renders the grid terrain, all buildings, and placement preview.
frontend/src/components/game/GridTerrain: Renders a textured grass plane with a grid overlay helper for the game terrain.
frontend/src/components/game/ResourceHea: Displays gold and elixir resource counts with icons in styled UI panels at the top-left of the screen.
frontend/src/components/game/troops/Troo: UI component for selecting and deploying troops (Barbarian, Archer, Giant) with portrait icons and counts. Provides click-to-deploy functionality on the game canvas.
React Three Fiber component that renders individual 3D troop models (Barbarian with sword/shield, Archer, Giant) with walking animations and weapon swing effects. Truncated in source.
frontend/src/components/layout/GameLayou: Main game layout component that manages mode switching between base building and attack mode, displays resource header, build menu, and renders the game canvas with footer.
frontend/src/constants/assets.ts: Exports a constant object mapping asset keys to their file paths for icons, portraits, and UI elements used throughout the game.
frontend/src/constants/buildingStats.ts: Defines metadata for all building types including size dimensions, colors, and material properties (metalness, roughness, emissive). Provides helper functions to retrieve building geometry and materials.
frontend/src/constants/theme.ts: Centralized theme configuration defining colors, material properties, terrain settings, grid styling, troop appearance, and particle effects for consistent visual styling across the game.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that manages the backend actor instance using Internet Identity authentication, creates authenticated or anonymous actors, and invalidates dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackMode.ts: Manages attack mode state including enemy base, troop deployment, battle simulation, and attack effects with visual feedback and result recording.
Handles building placement mode with ghost preview, position validation, and placement confirmation using mutations.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, identity management, and status tracking for ICP integration.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend actor interactions including resources, buildings, troop training, matchmaking, and attack recording with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useResources.ts: Query hook for fetching player resources (gold and elixir) with 5-second polling interval.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, fantasy-themed utility classes for panels, buttons, and resource counters.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query, Internet Identity provider, and renders the root App component.
frontend/src/utils/combatSimulation.ts: Utility functions for calculating destruction percentage, star ratings, and loot amounts based on combat outcomes.
frontend/src/utils/gridUtils.ts: Coordinate conversion utilities for transforming between 3D world positions and 2D grid locations with snapping functionality.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH, medieval font family, and animation keyframes for UI components.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking implemented features, architectural notes, known issues (graphics quality), and image requirements for terrain textures.
